allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host "Content: $\($r.Content\)" } catch { Write-Host "Hata: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "Servis calisıyor: $\($r.Content\)" } catch { Write-Host "Servis cevap vermiyor: $_" })
